title: Heritage Route
tagline: Walk through 500 years of Yoruba history
description: A 5-day journey from the streets of Lagos through the slave ports of Badagry, the rock fortress of Abeokuta, to the sacred cradle of civilization at Ile-Ife. This route takes you through the defining chapters of Yoruba and Nigerian history.
highlights: Ife bronze heads at National Museum

days.title: Lagos Island — Where History Begins
days.description: Explore Lagos Island's colonial heritage, from the oldest structures in the city to the vibrant markets that have traded for centuries.

activities.title: Freedom Park Tour
activities.description: Explore the transformed colonial prison, now a cultural centre

activities.title: Lunch at Yellow Chilli
activities.description: Chef Sisi Jemimah's contemporary Nigerian cuisine

activities.title: Nike Art Gallery
activities.description: Four floors of Nigerian art — painting, sculpture, textiles

activities.title: Sunset at Lekki Conservation Centre
activities.description: Walk the canopy walkway as the sun sets over the wetlands

activities.title: Dinner & Live Music
activities.description: Evening at a Victoria Island rooftop restaurant

days.title: Badagry — The Point of No Return
days.description: A solemn and powerful day exploring West Africa's slave trade history at one of the major departure ports.

activities.title: Depart Lagos for Badagry
activities.description: 1.5 hour drive west along the coast

activities.title: Badagry Heritage Museum
activities.description: Artifacts and exhibits from the slave trade era

activities.title: Point of No Return Walk
activities.description: Walk the route enslaved Africans took to the ships

activities.title: Lunch in Badagry
activities.description: Local seafood by the lagoon

activities.title: First Storey Building & Mission House
activities.description: Site of Nigeria's first school and missionary settlement

activities.title: Return to Lagos
activities.description: Evening at leisure

days.title: Abeokuta — Under the Rock
days.description: Journey to the Egba capital to climb the sacred Olumo Rock and discover the world capital of Adire textile art.

activities.title: Depart for Abeokuta
activities.description: 2 hour drive north via the expressway

activities.title: Olumo Rock
activities.description: Climb the sacred fortress, explore caves, enjoy panoramic views

activities.title: Lunch
activities.description: Traditional Egba cuisine — try the Amala and Ewedu

activities.title: Itoku Adire Market
activities.description: Watch Adire textile craftswomen at work, buy authentic pieces

activities.title: Alake's Palace
activities.description: Traditional Egba monarchy seat (if accessible)

activities.title: Check into hotel
activities.description: Overnight in Abeokuta or continue to Ibadan

days.title: Ile-Ife — Cradle of Civilization
days.description: Arrive at the spiritual and mythological birthplace of the Yoruba people.

activities.title: Drive to Ile-Ife
activities.description: 2.5 hours via Ibadan-Ife road

activities.title: Ooni of Ife's Palace
activities.description: Visit the seat of Africa's oldest traditional monarchy

activities.title: Lunch
activities.description: Local Ife cuisine

activities.title: National Museum, Ile-Ife
activities.description: See the world-famous Ife bronze heads and terracotta sculptures

activities.title: Ore Grove & Moremi Statue
activities.description: Sacred grove and the statue of Yoruba heroine Moremi Ajasoro

activities.title: Check into hotel
activities.description: Overnight in Ile-Ife or Osogbo

days.title: Osogbo Sacred Grove & Return
days.description: Experience the UNESCO World Heritage sacred forest before returning to Lagos.

activities.title: Drive to Osogbo
activities.description: 45 minutes from Ile-Ife

activities.title: Osun-Osogbo Sacred Grove
activities.description: Walk through the UNESCO site — shrines, sculptures, ancient forest

activities.title: Lunch in Osogbo
activities.description: Local restaurant

activities.title: Return to Lagos
activities.description: 4 hour drive back via the expressway

activities.title: Farewell dinner
activities.description: Celebrate the journey at a Lagos restaurant

title: Festival Route
tagline: Experience Lagos at its most electric
description: A 4-day immersion into Lagos's legendary Detty December season — concerts, beach parties, art fairs, and food festivals. This route is designed for the diaspora homecoming crowd.

days.title: Arrival & Art Scene
days.description: Settle in and start with Lagos's incredible art and cultural scene.

activities.title: Check into hotel
activities.description: Victoria Island or Lekki Phase 1

activities.title: Brunch at Art Café
activities.description: Gallery brunch experience

activities.title: Nike Art Gallery
activities.description: Four floors of Nigeria's best contemporary art

activities.title: Terra Kulture Theatre
activities.description: Catch an afternoon show

activities.title: Welcome dinner
activities.description: Rooftop dining with Lagos skyline views

days.title: Beach Day & Concert Night
days.description: Lagos beach culture by day, headliner concert by night.

activities.title: Landmark Beach
activities.description: Beach vibes, water sports, cocktails

activities.title: Lunch at Landmark Village
activities.description: Seaside restaurant strip

activities.title: Shopping & Prep
activities.description: Lagos designer boutiques — get concert ready

activities.title: Headliner Concert
activities.description: Major Detty December concert — Wizkid, Davido, or Burna Boy

days.title: Culture, Food & The Shrine
days.description: Deep cultural experience by day, legendary Afrobeat session by night.

activities.title: Freedom Park
activities.description: Morning walk through the heritage site

activities.title: Street Food Crawl
activities.description: Guided tour of Lagos's best street food — suya, boli, akara

activities.title: Lekki Market
activities.description: Souvenirs, crafts, and negotiations

activities.title: New Afrika Shrine
activities.description: Sunday session — live Afrobeat by Femi or Seun Kuti

days.title: Beach Party & Farewell
days.description: One last Lagos day — beach rave, sunset, and farewell.

activities.title: Elegushi Beach
activities.description: Beach party / rave — the heartbeat of Detty December

activities.title: Spa & Recovery
activities.description: Hotel spa treatment after the festivities

activities.title: Sunset cocktails
activities.description: Drinks at a waterfront bar

activities.title: Farewell dinner
activities.description: Final Lagos feast

title: Nature Route
description: A 3-day journey from the wetlands of Lekki to the sacred forests of Osogbo and the dramatic hilltop ruins of Idanre. For travellers who want nature, spirituality, and adventure.

days.title: Lekki Wetlands
days.description: Start your nature journey in Lagos's hidden green sanctuary.

activities.title: Early morning at Lekki Conservation Centre
activities.description: Best time for wildlife — monkeys, birds, crocodiles

activities.title: Canopy walkway
activities.description: Walk Africa's longest canopy walkway at 401 metres

activities.title: Lunch
activities.description: Fresh seafood near the lagoon

activities.title: Drive to Osogbo
activities.description: 4 hour drive to Osun State

activities.title: Check into hotel
activities.description: Rest in Osogbo

days.title: Sacred Grove & Forest Walk
days.description: Explore one of the last primary forests in southern Nigeria — a place of deep spiritual and ecological significance.

activities.title: Osun-Osogbo Sacred Grove
activities.description: Guided walk through the UNESCO World Heritage forest

activities.title: River walk
activities.description: Follow the Osun River through the grove

activities.title: Lunch in Osogbo
activities.description: Local cuisine

activities.title: Drive to Idanre
activities.description: 2.5 hour drive to Ondo State

activities.title: Check into hotel
activities.description: Rest at the base of Idanre Hills

days.title: Idanre Hills Summit
days.description: Climb 640 ancient steps to a hilltop ghost town where Yoruba history meets stunning natural beauty.

activities.title: Early climb of Idanre Hills
activities.description: 640 steps to the summit — best done before the heat

activities.title: Explore the old settlement
activities.description: Palace ruins, thunder god shrine, Agboogun footprint

activities.title: Descend and brunch
activities.description: Local breakfast at the base

activities.title: Return to Lagos
activities.description: 4.5 hour drive back
